---
name: Component request
about: Request a new component, variant, chart, or pattern
title: "[Component]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What do you need?

Describe the component, chart, pattern, or variant.

## Use Case

What product workflow does this support?

## API Ideas

Suggested attributes, properties, events, slots, or examples.

## Peer References

Link comparable patterns from Flowbite, shadcn/ui, Material UI, DaisyUI, Preline, Shoelace/Web Awesome, Bootstrap, or another library.

## Core or Pro?

Should this belong in the MIT core, or is it more likely a future Pro feature?
